title: MikroTik RouterBOARD R11e-5HacD 802.11ac miniPCI-e card with 2x MMCX
description: R11e-5HacD is our new 802.11ac card in miniPCI-express format, perfect for any RouterBOARD with miniPCIe slot, such as RB953, RB912, RB922, RB800 or x86 devices with RouterOS The card features built-in LED indicators for wireless mode, connection status (connected, searching, disabled), TX and RX activity and wireless signal strength - just looking at the card will help with installation and alignment
specsSearch: Wireless features Sensitivity [dBm] 96 Wireless frequency 5 GHz WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 866 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 27 Security WPA, WPA2, AES-CCM & TKIP Encryption, 802.1x, 64/128/152bit WEP Connectors and Interfaces Bus type miniPCI-e RF connectors (2) MMCX Power Max. power consumption [W] 4,5 Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 30 up to 65 Width [mm] 30 Height [mm] 13 Depth [mm] 50
